data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for code-based or automatic pricing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific pricing mechanisms, namely code-based (CUSTOMER20) or automatic (happy hour pricing). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these pricing mechanisms. The linked use case outlines the need for these features, but without direct evidence, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of code-based (CUSTOMER20) or automatic (happy hour pricing) pricing mechanisms.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of code-based and automatic pricing.
